details.automation_reason: No GitHub credentials (PAT/token) available. GitHub CLI not installed. No web form or API exists for submission.
details.submission_process: Fork repo → Edit data/servers.json → Submit Pull Request
details.notes: The domain mcplist.dev appears to be a parked domain that redirects to a GoDaddy parking page. The actual directory is maintained exclusively through the GitHub repository.

instructions: See MCPList_submission_guide.md for step-by-step manual submission instructions. The server entry JSON is in mcplist_submission_entry.json and can be pasted directly into data/servers.json.
